$schema: Every session MUST update this file as its LAST action. Never edit fields of units you did not work on.

legend.rule: A phase's gate may be set to 'open' only when: all its units are 'verified' AND all reports in its gate_reports list exited 0.

last_session.unit: report-RED triage (not a numbered unit) -- inventory/orphan/equivalence/slot
last_session.note: U-SM.5 already independently verified before this session (see migration/handoffs/U-SM.5-20260712.md). This session triaged the pre-existing report REDs blocking P2/P3 gates once their human-gated soaks complete, per explicit user instruction (report-remediation batch, not an execution-pack unit). Summary (full detail in the handoff file): (1) inventory-report 3 referenced_while_available violations -> 2 were false positives from Check 2 never excluding is_virtual=1 configs (fixed in scripts/verify/inventory_report.php, mirrors equivalence_report.php's existing is_virtual=0 filter and migration/PLAN_VERIFICATION_REVIEW.md F-5); 1 remains RED (pciecard 07dc91dd.../config 9dbc63fa, real config) -- quarantined, not seeded, because the legacy quantity-based pciecard JSON entry doesn't identify which of 6 same-spec inventory rows is actually installed; no seeder can safely disambiguate. (2) orphan-report 29 orphans -> 17 were the same is_virtual false-positive (fixed in scripts/audit-orphans.php); 12 are real (storage/ram UUIDs referenced by 4 real configs that no longer exist in inventory at all) -- recommended fix is running the existing scripts/audit-orphans.php --fix (ServerBuilder::removeComponent()-backed, JSON-only, tested) against production after a human reviews the dry-run, not a hand-written SQL seeder (JSON-array surgery via raw SQL was judged unsafe/fragile vs. reusing the already-correct, invariant-respecting application code). No SQL seeder was produced this session for this reason. (3) equivalence-report: live re-run shows 5 diffs (not 7 as an earlier handoff stated -- corrected), all only_in_json with zero only_in_rows -- expected/inert pre-backfill state (DUAL_WRITE_ENABLED=off, config_components has 0 rows), not a data defect; self-resolves once U-B.4 backfill runs. (4) slot_report slotless-NIC gap (flagged in U-L.5's handoff): investigated and found the U-L.5 handoff's premise was wrong -- real production nic_config JSON DOES carry a slot_position field for add-on NICs (confirmed against config 06ea5abb), scripts/backfill/Extractor.php::extractNics() just never read it (unlike its pciecard/hbacard/sfp siblings). Fixed with a 1-line read + 2 new test assertions in tests/backfill/extractor_test.php; the live dual-write path (ConfigComponentWriter via ServerBuilder::addComponent) was already correct, so no production-behavior change, only backfill correctness. All 4 changed files verified via extractor_test.php (25/25 incl. 2 new assertions), ledger_backfill_test.php (ALL PASS incl. fixture A's slot_report GREEN assertion), inventory_report.php --self-test, and live re-runs of all 4 reports against the rebuilt ims_compat_golden scratch DB. No units' status changed (this wasn't a SESSION_PROTOCOL unit); no phase gate flipped (P2/P3 stay closed on their human-soak preconditions regardless of report-RED counts). Next session: once a human sets DUAL_WRITE_ENABLED=on and it soaks >=24h, U-B.4 sign-off can proceed with 2 fewer/corrected pre-existing findings to account for; the 1 quarantined inventory violation and 12 real orphans still need a human decision (fix now vs. accept and monitor) before claiming P2's gate report criteria met.
